Application.description: An application: a named grouping of resources with its own scope within the project.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

databases.description: Map of name -> Database (authored under databases/<name>.yaml).

domains.description: Map of name -> Domain (authored under domains/<name>.yaml).

functions.description: Map of name -> Function (authored under functions/<name>.yaml).

libraries.description: Map of name -> Library (authored under libraries/<name>.yaml).

messaging.description: Map of name -> Messaging (authored under messaging/<name>.yaml).

services.description: Map of name -> Service (authored under services/<name>.yaml).

smartops.description: Map of name -> SmartOp (authored under smartops/<name>.yaml).

storages.description: Map of name -> Storage (authored under storages/<name>.yaml).

websites.description: Map of name -> Website (authored under websites/<name>.yaml).

Database.description: A key-value database served to the project's peers.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

match.description: Key or key-pattern this database serves (a literal prefix, or a regex when useRegex is set).
match.title: Match

regex.description: Treat match as a regular expression instead of a literal prefix.
regex.title: Use Regex

network.description: Which peers may reach this database: all, subnet (project peers only), or host (local node only).
network.title: Network Access

size.description: Maximum storage size, as a human string (e.g. "32MB", "1GB").
size.title: Size

key.description: Key material or reference used to encrypt data at rest.
key.title: Encryption Key

Domain.description: A DNS domain and its TLS configuration, referenced by functions and websites.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

fqdn.description: Fully-qualified domain name this resource represents.
fqdn.title: FQDN

cert.description: PEM-encoded TLS certificate for the domain (inline certificate-type).
cert.title: Certificate

key.description: PEM-encoded private key for the certificate (inline certificate-type).
key.title: Certificate Key

type.description: How the TLS certificate is provisioned: inline (supplied here) or auto (managed).
type.title: Certificate Type

Function.description: A serverless function triggered over HTTP(S), PubSub, or p2p.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

type.description: Trigger that invokes the function: http, https, pubsub, or p2p.
type.title: Trigger Type

local.description: Restrict the trigger to the local node / project scope.
local.title: Local

channel.description: PubSub channel the function subscribes to (pubsub trigger).
channel.title: PubSub Channel

protocol.description: libp2p protocol the function serves (p2p trigger).
protocol.title: P2P Protocol

command.description: Command name within the p2p protocol this function handles.
command.title: P2P Command

method.description: HTTP method the function handles (http/https trigger).
method.title: HTTP Method

domains.description: Domains that route to this function. Each must name a defined domain.
domains.title: Domains

paths.description: URL path patterns that route to this function (http/https trigger).
paths.title: Paths

source.description: Code source: "." for inline code, or "libraries/<name>" to build from a defined library.
source.title: Source

timeout.description: Maximum execution time, as a human string (e.g. "30s").
timeout.title: Timeout

memory.description: Maximum memory the function may use, as a human string (e.g. "32MB").
memory.title: Memory

call.description: Exported entrypoint symbol invoked in the WASM module.
call.title: Entrypoint

x-tau-sections.description: The function's code source and entrypoint.
x-tau-sections.title: Code

Library.description: A reusable code library backed by a git repository, referenced as a function/smartop source.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

path.description: Subpath within the repository that holds the library code.
path.title: Path

branch.description: Git branch to build the library from.
branch.title: Branch

git-provider.description: Source-control provider hosting the repository (the key selects the provider block).
git-provider.title: Provider

x-tau-sections.description: Where the library's code is sourced from.
x-tau-sections.title: Source

Messaging.description: A PubSub messaging channel, optionally bridged to MQTT/WebSocket.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

local.description: Restrict the channel to the local node / project scope.
local.title: Local

match.description: Channel name or pattern this messaging resource matches.
match.title: Match

regex.description: Treat match as a regular expression.
regex.title: Regex

enable.description: Expose this channel over the MQTT bridge.
enable.title: MQTT

enable.description: Expose this channel over the WebSocket bridge.
enable.title: WebSocket

Service.description: A libp2p service advertised on the network.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

protocol.description: libp2p protocol identifier this service advertises.
protocol.title: Protocol

SmartOp.description: A smartop: policy/hook code (inline or backed by a library) attached to every resource.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

source.description: Code source: "." for inline code, or "libraries/<name>" to build from a defined library.
source.title: Source

timeout.description: Maximum execution time, as a human string (e.g. "30s").
timeout.title: Timeout

memory.description: Maximum memory the smartop may use, as a human string (e.g. "32MB").
memory.title: Memory

call.description: Exported entrypoint symbol invoked in the WASM module.
call.title: Entrypoint

x-tau-sections.description: The smartop's code source and entrypoint.
x-tau-sections.title: Code

Storage.description: Object or streaming storage served to the project's peers.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

type.description: Storage kind: object or streaming (the key selects the type block).
type.title: Type

match.description: Key or key-pattern this storage serves (a literal prefix, or a regex when useRegex is set).
match.title: Match

regex.description: Treat match as a regular expression instead of a literal prefix.
regex.title: Use Regex

network.description: Which peers may reach this storage: all, subnet (project peers only), or host (local node only).
network.title: Network Access

versioning.description: Keep historical versions of objects (object storage).
versioning.title: Versioning

ttl.description: Time-to-live for streamed entries, as a human string (e.g. "1h") (streaming storage).
ttl.title: Time-To-Live

size.description: Maximum storage size, as a human string (e.g. "1GB").
size.title: Size

x-tau-sections.description: Storage kind, key matching, and capacity.
x-tau-sections.title: Storage

Website.description: A static website built from a git repository and served over one or more domains.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

domains.description: Domains that serve this website. Each must name a defined domain.
domains.title: Domains

paths.description: URL path patterns served by this website.
paths.title: Paths

branch.description: Git branch to build the website from.
branch.title: Branch

git-provider.description: Source-control provider hosting the repository (the key selects the provider block).
git-provider.title: Provider

x-tau-sections.description: Where the website's code is sourced from.
x-tau-sections.title: Source

description: The Taubyte DSL and its constraints. Resources are authored one file per instance under <group>/<name>.yaml (and applications/<app>/<group>/<name>.yaml); this schema models the assembled project. x-tau-ref / x-tau-validation mark checks the compiler enforces that a plain JSON Schema validator cannot.

id.description: Content-addressed identifier (CID) of this resource. Stable across renames.
id.title: ID

name.description: Unique resource name within its project or application. Must be a valid variable name.
name.title: Name

description.description: Free-form, human-readable description of this resource.
description.title: Description

tags.description: Arbitrary labels for organizing and filtering this resource.
tags.title: Tags

databases.description: Map of name -> Database (authored under databases/<name>.yaml).

domains.description: Map of name -> Domain (authored under domains/<name>.yaml).

functions.description: Map of name -> Function (authored under functions/<name>.yaml).

libraries.description: Map of name -> Library (authored under libraries/<name>.yaml).

messaging.description: Map of name -> Messaging (authored under messaging/<name>.yaml).

services.description: Map of name -> Service (authored under services/<name>.yaml).

smartops.description: Map of name -> SmartOp (authored under smartops/<name>.yaml).

storages.description: Map of name -> Storage (authored under storages/<name>.yaml).

websites.description: Map of name -> Website (authored under websites/<name>.yaml).

applications.description: Map of name -> Application (authored under applications/<name>.yaml).

title: Taubyte project configuration
